creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #11)
What I did (before your feedback was:

svn cp cad/calculix cad/calculix-ccx
svn mv cad/calculix cad/calculix-cgx

Both ports are fairly independent: cgx can use other solvers, different from ccx. What keeps them together is that the documentation is installed in ${PREFIX}/share/doc/CalculiX. At some point we may drop the run dependency.
I don't care much about renaming or not, but it looks somewhat confusing to have a -ccx without a -cgx counterpart.

I plan to add other calculix- ports. There are some tools to do format conversions and a python frontend.

Also it was not possible to do the CR request from the command line, it kept asking for my password, and the MOVED file kept changing every time I updated ports.
